    [Documentation](https://www.ubereats.com)[Privacy Policy](https://www.uber.com/global/en/privacy-notice-riders-order-recipients/?uclick_id=7ba84e61-1155-4b44-ac26-cd72336df732)[Support](https://help.uber.com/en/ubereats/restaurants)
    

Get food delivery to your doorstep from thousands of amazing local and national restaurants. Search and browse restaurants and dishes near you to find the meal you crave.

You can use Uber Eats to:

**Find dinner:**  
"What sushi places near me are open and deliver in under 30 minutes?"

**Discover dishes:**  
"Find the highest-rated birria tacos available for delivery right now"

**Browse by craving:**  
"Show me healthy lunch bowls under $15 nearby"
